title: Topology Permissions page — gadmin user-pivot surface hosting UserNodeAssignment (B6.8)
scope:
Build the gadmin-only Topology Permissions page that hosts the UserNodeAssignment picker shipped by PLA-0044 (story 00544). The page is the user-pivot surface validated by R054 (Rally Dev): one user on the left, every topology node on the right, with checkbox-driven assign/unassign. Single-role MVP — per-row role dropdown is deferred. Entered from the existing Users row-expand panel (/workspace-settings/users) via a 'Manage topology permissions' button.

Reuses the already-shipped GrantRole / RevokeRole handlers + the UserNodeAssignment primitive. Adds a single new read handler (ListGrantsByUser), one new permission code (topology.grants.manage_others), and one new permission seed migration.
value: Closes the gap between PLA-0044's picker primitive and a real admin workflow: today the picker exists but has no host. With this surface, a gadmin can grant or revoke node-level access for any user from a single screen, replacing the implicit 'self-pivot only' restriction in ListMyGrants. Validates the R054 user-pivot pattern against Vector's read-clamp-only model.
implementation_plan: Step 1 — Backend service: add Service.ListGrantsByUser(ctx, subscriptionID, targetUserID, actorRole) gated by topology.grants.manage_others.
Step 2 — Backend handler: GET /api/topology/users/{userId}/grants, registered on /_site and /samantha/v2 per PLA-0039.
Step 3 — Permission code: add TopologyGrantsManageOthers constant + register in permission catalogue.
Step 4 — Migration 147: seed topology.grants.manage_others permission + grant to gadmin role (UUID ad30).
Step 5 — Frontend API: topologyApi.listGrantsByUser(userId) helper using apiSite.

Step 6 — Frontend page: app/(user)/workspace-settings/users/[userId]/topology-permissions/page.tsx — gadmin-gated, fetches user + tree + grants, renders UserNodeAssignment, wires onToggle to GrantRole/RevokeRole.
Step 7 — Entry button: add 'Manage topology permissions' to the existing UserEditPanel on /workspace-settings/users.
Step 8 — CSS: extend .dui-* or app/globals.css with .topology-permissions__layout primitives (no bespoke per-page class).
Step 9 — Tests + docs: backend unit + handler tests for ListGrantsByUser; manual smoke flow documented in plan AC.
areas_impacted: POR-API: orgdesign.Service + topology REST surface (2 new entry points)
SEC: 1 new permission code seeded on gadmin role
POR: new gadmin page route + entry button
DEV: unit + handler tests, plan close-out docs
feature_list: Backend ListGrantsByUser service method + REST handler (dual-transport)
topology.grants.manage_others permission code seeded on gadmin role
Entry button on existing Users row-expand panel
Reuses UserNodeAssignment primitive from PLA-0044 — no new tree-walking code
features_extended: UserEditPanel at /workspace-settings/users — gains 'Manage topology permissions' entry button (gadmin-only).

work_item_backlog.title: Backend: Service.ListGrantsByUser — list every active grant for a target user, gated by manage_others permission
Backend: GET /api/topology/users/{userId}/grants handler — dual-mount on /_site and /samantha/v2
Permission code: TopologyGrantsManageOthers constant + catalogue registration
Migration 147: seed topology.grants.manage_others permission + grant on gadmin role
Frontend page: /workspace-settings/users/[userId]/topology-permissions — hosts UserNodeAssignment, wires GrantRole/RevokeRole
Frontend entry: 'Manage topology permissions' button on UserEditPanel row-expand
Backend tests: TestListGrantsByUser unit + handler tests (gadmin pass, non-gadmin 403, target-user empty)
Docs + close-out: c_c_topology.md update, B6.8 scope tick, PLA-0046 close-out

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Service.ListGrantsByUser(actorRole=gadmin) returns every active grant for the target user; non-gadmin actor receives sentinel ErrForbidden.
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: Go unit test in backend/internal/orgdesign/service_test.go covering gadmin success + non-gadmin 403 paths.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: GET /api/topology/users/{userId}/grants returns 200 JSON array for gadmin, 403 for non-gadmin, and is registered on both /_site and /samantha/v2.
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: Handler test asserting status codes + JSON body; route registration verified by grep of main.go.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: TopologyGrantsManageOthers permission code 'topology.grants.manage_others' exists in backend/internal/permissions and appears in the catalogue list endpoint.
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: grep of permission constants + GET /api/permissions includes the code.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Migration 147 applied successfully against dev DB; row exists in permissions table + role_permissions junction row for gadmin role (UUID ad30…).
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: SELECT FROM permissions WHERE code='topology.grants.manage_others' returns one row; JOIN with roles_permissions+roles confirms gadmin grant.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: topologyApi.listGrantsByUser(userId) function exists in app/lib/topologyApi.ts and returns typed MyGrant[] using apiSite helper.
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: TypeScript compile passes; manual call from React DevTools returns array.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Page at /workspace-settings/users/[userId]/topology-permissions renders the user's name, the full topology tree, and a checkbox per node reflecting current grant state; toggling a checkbox calls GrantRole/RevokeRole and updates the UI optimistically.
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: Manual smoke: log in as gadmin, navigate to the page, toggle a node, refresh — selection persists.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: 'Manage topology permissions' button visible on the row-expand panel at /workspace-settings/users for gadmin users only (gated by useHasPermission('topology.grants.manage_others')).
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: Manual smoke: button visible as gadmin, hidden as padmin/user; click routes to the new page.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Backend test suite passes — TestListGrantsByUser covers 3 cases (gadmin returns grants, non-gadmin gets 403, target user with no grants returns empty array).
docs/c_c_topology.md updated with the new admin surface; Vector_Scope.md B6.8 marked complete; PLA-0046 marked complete in c_plan_index.md.
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: git diff shows updates to all three files; c_plan_index.md row reads 'complete (YYYY-MM-DD)'.

risks.risk: ListGrantsByUser bypasses the read-clamp by design (gadmin viewing another user's grants). If the permission check is misordered, a padmin could enumerate gadmin grants.
risks.mitigation: Permission check is the FIRST statement in the service method, before any DB query. Handler test asserts 403 for non-gadmin actor.

risks.risk: Page CSS drifts from .dui-* catalogue (HARD RULE for /dev pages — workspace-settings is not /dev but follows the same hygiene).
risks.mitigation: Reuse existing layout primitives from /workspace-settings/users page; new .topology-permissions* additions are layout-only, no inline styles.

risks.risk: Optimistic UI mismatches backend state if GrantRole/RevokeRole fails mid-toggle.
risks.mitigation: onToggle wraps server call in try/catch; on failure, revert local state + show in-page error (no browser alert per memory rule).

references.label: R054 Rally Dev research — user-pivot pattern validation
